hero.kicker: — on my way to become obsolete
hero.lede: devops manager at palo alto networks. i build agents that do my job, so i can go build the next one. the goal is to make myself unnecessary. that is the whole job.
hero.lede_cv: boss at palo alto networks. build robot. robot do job. build next robot.

the weekly self-hosted AI kickoff i started.

projects.name: CodeKoala
projects.desc: add a label to a PR. 30 seconds later, koala posts a structured review. running quietly inside palo alto networks' github enterprise — 194 reviews last week across 56 repos. strips sycophancy on parse, so it never tells you your code is “great”.
projects.desc_cv: put label on PR. koala appear. koala review. koala not compliment. koala honest.

projects.name: brif
projects.desc: a mission-aware statusline for claude code. tells you when context is dying. shows goal, cost, model. asks before it does anything irreversible — that APPROVE button is the only feature i actually care about.
projects.desc_cv: bar at bottom. bar say 'context die soon'. bar ask before explode. me like bar.

projects.name: skit
projects.desc: the npm of AICs. install once, works in claude code AND cursor AND windsurf. started on a tuesday afternoon when i should have been doing something else.
projects.desc_cv: npm but robot. one install. all editor. built on tuesday. should not have.

projects.name: amit-hub
projects.desc: git worktrees an agent can drive without losing its mind. CLI + VS Code ext + claude code MCP plugin — one TS core, three surfaces. a colleague built the same thing privately before i shipped. that's how i knew it was real.
projects.desc_cv: agent get own branch. agent not confused. colleague build same. that mean good idea.

projects.name: workwright
projects.desc: playwright, but for terminals. an MCP server that lets an agent drive a real PTY — run a command, watch the output stream, react. the thing claude code couldn't do until it could.
projects.desc_cv: playwright but terminal. agent type command. agent watch output. agent react. very useful.

writing.title: short memory.
writing.excerpt: “Too dangerous to release” is a press release, not a safety decision. The fact stays. The feeling wipes clean.

writing.title: the context bar.
writing.excerpt: Context window saturation is silent degradation. I built a monitoring system for a machine that does my work.

writing.title: the package manager nobody asked for.
writing.excerpt: AI assistants quietly became a runtime. Runtimes always get a package manager. Someone always gets annoyed enough.

writing.title: things i didn't know.
writing.excerpt: Working effectively with AI coding agents is not a coding skill. It is an architectural, process, and delegation skill.
